info.name: Company Exam Portal API Copy

request.description:
Admin updates the status of a ticket and optionally adds resolution notes.
Resolution notes are required when setting status to 'resolved' or 'closed'.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description: Admin views details of a specific ticket including company info

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer
Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

request.description:
Admin views all tickets. Supports optional query filters:
- status_filter: open | in_progress | resolved | closed
- category_filter: billing | drive | technical | general
- priority_filter: low | medium | high | urgent

request.description: Login student with email and access token
Validate if student token is still valid
Get drive information including window times and exam duration
Start the exam - generate randomized question order and check window eligibility
Get all exam questions in the student's randomized order

Called by the frontend when it decides to disqualify a student.
The frontend handles all anti-cheat logic; this endpoint simply
persists the disqualification and auto-submits the exam.
Submit exam with all answers
Get student's exam result
API root endpoint
Health check endpoint for production monitoring
